case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2128 US CURRENCY

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA GROSS, JOSEPH
AMENDED CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,128.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY RANDY SUE POLLOCK ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JOSEPH GROSS. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR RESPECTIVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2128 US CURRENCY DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF JOSEPH GROSS. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
